strings.app.title: Monogatari Engine
strings.home.subtitle: LLM-Powered Visual Novel Engine
strings.chat.title: AI Chat
strings.chat.session-desc: Profiles, relationship state, streaming replies, and scoring stay in one focused surface.
strings.game.runtime-desc: AI-ready visual novel playback with dialogue state, Live2D staging, and saves.
strings.settings.title: Settings
strings.settings.project-summary: Project identity, package, and directory contract.
strings.settings.browser-notice: Browser preview keeps project changes in memory. Desktop builds write settings.json and initialize the engine.
strings.settings.package-format: Verified .monogatari archive and portable JSON manifest
strings.settings.import-package-title: Import and verify a .monogatari project package
strings.settings.ai-summary: Select the inference path used by authoring and runtime tools.
strings.settings.provider-contract: One active provider is used across the project.
strings.settings.secret-note: Credentials stay in runtime memory and are excluded from project files.
strings.settings.local-model-note: Paths remain relative to the active project root.
strings.settings.directml-note: Use the Windows GPU execution provider when available.
strings.settings.voice-summary: Default provider and delivery profile for generated character voice.
strings.settings.voice-provider-note: System speech is local; API providers require runtime credentials.
strings.settings.delivery-note: Defaults can be overridden by individual character voices.
strings.settings.sync-summary: Track save inventory and validate remote connection settings.
strings.settings.sync-preflight-note: Remote mode validates credentials and records the local save manifest; remote file transfer is not enabled in this build.
strings.settings.local-manifest-note: Manifest stays inside the active project.
strings.settings.remote-preflight-note: Endpoint and token are validated in runtime memory.
strings.settings.diagnostics-summary: Runtime inventory and project configuration checks.
strings.settings.issue.settings-not-file: settings.json must be a regular file inside the project root.
strings.settings.issue.settings-too-large: settings.json exceeds the supported size limit.
strings.settings.issue.settings-not-object: settings.json must contain a JSON object.
strings.settings.issue.settings-invalid-json: settings.json could not be parsed as valid JSON.
strings.settings.issue.settings-missing: The project has no settings.json; defaults are active.
strings.settings.issue.path-missing: A required project directory is missing.
strings.settings.issue.path-duplicate: Multiple path entries resolve to the same directory.
strings.settings.issue.path-invalid: The project path must remain relative to the project root.
strings.settings.issue.api-url-missing: The API base URL is empty.
strings.settings.issue.api-key-missing: The API key is not configured in runtime memory.
strings.settings.issue.onnx-model-missing: The ONNX model path is empty.
strings.settings.issue.ai-provider-invalid: The AI provider must be API or ONNX.
strings.settings.notice.preview-updated: Browser preview settings updated for this session
strings.settings.notice.package-verified: Project package verified; no import destination was selected
strings.settings.notice.import-init-failed: Project imported to {path}, but initialization failed: {error}
strings.workflow.title: Workflow Editor
strings.workflow.preview-context-state: Use authored score and relationship inputs
strings.workflow.execution-empty: Run the workflow to inspect its trace
strings.workflow.fix-before-save: Fix validation errors before saving or exporting.
strings.workflow.delete-node-message: The node and every connection to it will be removed.
strings.workflow.discard-message: Changes since the last save will be lost.
strings.workflow.notice.browser-saved: Workflow saved as a browser draft
strings.workflow.error.invalid-document: The selected file is not a workflow document.
strings.workflow.node-desc.llm-generate: Generate text with the active model
strings.workflow.field.label: Label
strings.workflow.field.name: Name
strings.workflow.field.speaker: Speaker
strings.workflow.blocker.no-chat-session: No chat session is available in local preview.
strings.workflow.blocker.rule-missing: The event has no trigger rule.
strings.workflow.blocker.type-mismatch: The configured event type does not match.
strings.workflow.blocker.character-not-allowed: The event does not allow this character.
strings.workflow.issue.workflow-empty: The workflow must contain at least one node.
strings.workflow.issue.node-id-empty: Every node must have an ID.
strings.workflow.issue.start-node-missing: The workflow must include a start node.
strings.workflow.issue.start-node-multiple: Multiple start nodes were found; only the configured start node is used.
strings.workflow.issue.start-node-id-empty: A start node must be configured.
strings.workflow.issue.start-node-not-found: The configured start node does not exist.
strings.workflow.issue.start-node-type-invalid: The configured start node must use the start type.
strings.workflow.issue.end-node-missing: The workflow has no end node.
strings.workflow.issue.node-type-unknown: The node type is not supported.
strings.workflow.issue.node-config-missing: A required node field is missing.
strings.workflow.issue.node-event-unknown: The selected story event is not in the active project catalog.
strings.workflow.issue.node-event-character-mism: The selected story event is unavailable for this character.
strings.workflow.issue.connection-self: A node cannot connect to itself.
strings.workflow.issue.connection-target-missing: A connection points to a missing node.
strings.workflow.issue.connection-duplicate: The same connection appears more than once.
strings.workflow.issue.node-unreachable: The node cannot be reached from the configured start node.

strings.home.workspace-copy: Move from character foundations to a playable, quality-checked route without losing your place.
strings.home.runtime-ready-copy: Content managers are loaded and the project is ready for authoring and preview.
strings.home.runtime-setup-copy: Initialize the project and connect an AI backend before testing live story paths.
strings.home.stage.foundation-copy: Create character intent, personality, and the knowledge that keeps generation consistent.
strings.home.stage.narrative-copy: Build the visible stage and the dialogue graphs players will move through.
strings.home.stage.logic-copy: Wire progression, score gates, unlocks, and reusable workflow behavior.
strings.home.stage.test-copy: Play the route, inspect AI behavior, and run quality gates before packaging.
strings.home.no-recent-copy: Open an editor and your latest items will appear here.

strings.scene.inferred-delete-help: Inferred scenes have no metadata file to delete
strings.scene.warning.no-background: No background is assigned to this scene.
strings.scene.warning.unresolved-background: The saved background path does not resolve to a project file.
strings.scene.notice.reloaded: Scene definitions and asset diagnostics are current.
strings.scene.notice.asset-remains: {id} remains available from its background asset.

strings.ending.notice.saved-message: {title} passed project reload and reference validation.

strings.dialogue.error.choose-start: Choose another start node before deleting this node.

strings.dialogue.notice.deleted-message: {id} was removed and the runtime catalog was reloaded.

strings.event.error.metadata-object: Metadata must be a JSON object
strings.event.error.description: {label}: description is required and limited to 2048 characters

strings.achievements.title: Achievements
strings.achievements.subtitle: Review player milestones, relationship progress, and story unlocks.
strings.achievements.locked-description: Continue playing to reveal this achievement.
strings.achievements.empty: No achievements are available in this category.
strings.achievements.item.first_chat.name: First Words
strings.achievements.item.first_chat.description: Send your first message to an AI character.
strings.achievements.item.chat_10.name: Getting Chatty
strings.achievements.item.chat_10.description: Send 10 messages in a single conversation.
strings.achievements.item.chat_50.name: Conversationalist
strings.achievements.item.high_relationship.name: Best Friends
strings.achievements.item.high_relationship.desc: Reach a relationship score of 0.8 with any character.
strings.achievements.item.all_characters.name: Meet Everyone
strings.achievements.item.all_characters.descrip: Chat with every available character at least once.
strings.achievements.item.first_save.name: Save Point
strings.achievements.item.first_save.description: Save your game for the first time.
strings.achievements.item.first_workflow.name: Story Architect
strings.achievements.item.first_workflow.descrip: Create and save your first workflow.
strings.achievements.item.knowledge_10.name: Lore Keeper
strings.achievements.item.knowledge_10.descripti: Add 10 entries to the knowledge base.
strings.achievements.item.eval_high.name: Star Performer
strings.achievements.item.eval_high.description: Get an overall evaluation score above 80%.
strings.achievements.item.group_chat.name: Party Organizer
strings.achievements.item.group_chat.description: Start your first group chat with multiple characters.
strings.achievements.item.story_mode.name: Visual Novel Player
strings.achievements.item.story_mode.description: Start the Story Mode runtime for the first time.
strings.achievements.item.export_project.name: Publisher
strings.achievements.item.title_screen.name: First Impressions
strings.achievements.item.backlog_reader.name: Historian
strings.achievements.item.cg_collector.name: Scene Collector

strings.knowledge.validation.category-format: Category must use lowercase letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.

strings.characters.editor.identity-copy: Define the name and stable context used throughout the project.
strings.characters.editor.description-placeholde: Short description shown in character lists
strings.characters.editor.background-placeholder: Character history, motivations, and important context
strings.characters.editor.voice-copy: Set the baseline tone used by dialogue and model-generated responses.
strings.characters.editor.assets-copy: Use project-relative paths; the preview selects Live2D, 3D, then sprite fallback.
strings.characters.editor.personality-copy: These values shape model responses. Higher values amplify the trait in conversation.
strings.characters.editor.trait.openness: Curiosity, creativity, and willingness to try new things.
strings.characters.editor.trait.extraversion: Sociability, assertiveness, and energy from interactions.
strings.characters.editor.trait.agreeableness: Compassion, cooperation, and trust toward others.
strings.characters.editor.trait.neuroticism: Emotional sensitivity, anxiety, and mood variability.
strings.characters.editor.emotion-copy: Describe how each emotion changes the character’s phrasing and rhythm.
strings.characters.editor.expression-copy: Override the fallback sprite for individual emotions.
strings.characters.editor.relationship-copy: Set initial scores from -1.0 hostile to 1.0 close bond.
strings.characters.editor.no-relationships: Create another character to configure relationships.
strings.characters.editor.knowledge-copy: Pin project knowledge and add private facts injected into conversations.
strings.characters.editor.pinned-help: Pinned entries are placed before search results in model context.
strings.characters.editor.local-knowledge-copy: Keep character-specific facts alongside the character definition.
strings.characters.editor.empty-copy: Select a character to edit or create a new cast member.
strings.characters.editor.restore-copy: Browser character drafts will be removed and project files loaded again.
strings.characters.editor.discard-copy: Your changes to this character have not been saved.
strings.characters.editor.validation.required: Character ID and name are required.
strings.characters.editor.validation.id: ID can use only letters, numbers, underscores, or hyphens.
strings.characters.editor.validation.knowledge: Remove unknown knowledge references before saving.
strings.characters.editor.validation.local-knowl: Each private knowledge entry needs a topic and content.
strings.characters.editor.notice.restore-failed: Project characters could not be restored: {error}

strings.analytics.preview.choice-1: Tell me about the cherry blossoms
strings.analytics.sample-notice: Web preview uses a localized sample dataset. Desktop projects read analytics.json.

strings.shortcuts.title: Keyboard shortcuts
strings.whats-new.release-090-1: Title Screen, CG Gallery, and Backlog are available
strings.whats-new.release-090-2: Mio joins the cast with a branching festival dialogue
strings.whats-new.release-090-3: Story Mode supports autosave and project scene backgrounds
strings.whats-new.release-090-4: App metadata, social previews, and the favicon were refreshed
strings.whats-new.release-091-2: Hana joins the cast with tea shop dialogue and lore
strings.whats-new.release-091-3: Kai joins the cast with musician dialogue and songs
strings.whats-new.release-092-1: Nori joins the cast with a branching dialogue and town history
strings.whats-new.release-092-2: Achievement notifications appear when milestones are reached
strings.whats-new.release-092-3: Story Mode includes pause, save, load, backlog, and title actions
strings.whats-new.release-092-4: Quick save and quick load are available during gameplay
strings.whats-new.release-092-5: Keyboard shortcut help is available from the question mark key
strings.whats-new.release-092-6: Sora joins the cast with observatory dialogue and lore
strings.whats-new.release-092-7: Core views support English, Chinese, Japanese, and Korean
strings.whats-new.release-095-1: Tauri desktop build restored with locked Rust dependencies
strings.whats-new.release-095-2: Locale catalogs repaired for English, Chinese, Japanese, and Korean
strings.whats-new.release-095-3: The i18n loader now supports desktop and Web/PWA locale files
strings.whats-new.release-095-4: TTS configuration now supports system, Azure, and ElevenLabs providers
strings.whats-new.release-095-5: Project export now inventories distributable content
strings.whats-new.title: What's new
strings.whats-new.up-to-date: This workspace is up to date.
